lt.line: Išsipildė, kas buvo pranašo pasakyta: „Aš atversiu savo burną palyginimais, išpasakosiu nuo pasaulio sukūrimo paslėptus dalykus“.

en.event: Monday of the Seventeenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: He spoke to them only in parables, to fulfill what had been said through the prophet: I will open my mouth in parables, I will announce what has lain hidden from the foundation of
